subcodes.first_line: Although thou dost raise thy lamentations and cries of grief, and though thou dost voice thy complaints, these are meet and fitting; yet from another perspective consider thou that the chosen ones of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه ناله و فغان نمائی و شکوه فرمائی در موقع و محلّست ولی از جهت ديگر ملاحظه فرما که اوليای الهی را نشئه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @suffering and imprisonment, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @thankfulness; gratitude
